Jerome - checked out your site and thought of some angles for the videos,

Here's a few directions I could go:

- My friend tries to send money home, struggling with fees, I show him PayAngel, he’s shocked at how easy it is.
- Family video call with relatives abroad, I mention PayAngel, everyone starts sharing how much they save on fees now.
- Grandma needs money sent urgently, I pull out PayAngel app, send it in seconds, she bursts into tears of joy. 

Videos like these got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across all platforms—worth exploring or not?

Best, Imann

If not a fit let me know

Hi Nicole,

We don’t usually run single-video campaigns. Our standard collaborations typically include 3–5 branded videos across platforms, plus creative ideation, concept development, and copywriting to properly showcase the product.

Because of that, our partnerships usually fall somewhere between $4,000–$30,000, depending on the complexity and length of the collaboration. That said, if we see a good fit, we’re definitely open to discussing what could work.

Happy to jump on a quick call to explore it. I’m free Fri 12pm or 3pm EST, and Mon 1pm or 4pm EST — either works?

Imman

messages.subject: Daniel - Imann

messages.email_body:
Daniel - revisited your site and brainstormed ideas for the videos.

Here are some angles:

- Friends and I explore Eyeora's VR app together, I try to impress them with a cool trick, end up crashing into a virtual wall.
- I set up a live event in Eyeora, while streaming, my cat jumps in front of the camera, everyone starts cheering for "the new star."
- Show my grandma how to use Eyeora for her art, she creates a stunning VR gallery, now she’s planning a virtual exhibition, everyone’s hyped.

Content in this style got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across all platforms.Worth exploring or not?

-Imann

If not a fit let me know

messages.subject: RE: Zelal - Imann

messages.email_body:
Hey Imman,

You absolutely made my day😃 That message alone almost justified the wait  and you’re totally right to call it out.

I wanted to be transparent with you. I connected internally with my team regarding your profile, and while we genuinely loved your humor, creativity, and strong engagement, unfortunately the rate range you shared is currently way above what we’re able to support within our existing budget constraints.

This is purely a timing and budget limitation on our side, not a reflection of the quality of your work at all. I’m really sorry for keeping you in the loop longer than ideal, and I truly appreciate your patience throughout.

That said, I’m absolutely keeping you (and especially your sense of humor) on my radar. Once budgets open up or the right opportunity comes along, I’d genuinely love to revisit and reconnect.

Thanks again for the laugh and for reaching out  wishing you nothing but great collabs ahead.

Best,
Elifnaz Erdoğan

messages.email_body:
Hey Ritu

Who Should I talk to someone at Unstop responsible for influencer partnerships?

I run ItssIMANNN with close to 10M subscribers generating up to 361M monthly views.

one campaign with Whiteout Survival hit 48M views and pulled over 100k of new users. I also worked with Gauth AI too (over 15M views)that's fire.

There’s a lot of career development fans watching our videos —seems like that's exactly who Unstop is built for.

Worth a quick chat?

Best, Imann

If doesnt seem like a fit let me know
messages.subject: quick question Ritu

messages.email_body:
Ritu, went back to your site and brainstormed ideas for the videos,

Could go a few ways:

- A student panics over a coding competition, their friend shows them Unstop’s real-time coding tool. They ace it, everyone cheers!
- During a hackathon, a team struggles with ideas until they use Unstop’s skill assessment, find hidden talents, and win the challenge!
- At a job fair, one student flaunts their Unstop certifications, while others are jealous, revealing their secret to career success.

These formats got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across our channels—Worth exploring ?

-Imann

If doesnt seem like a fit let me know

My name is Kay, and I’m Dimple’s assistant. Dimple is open to connecting with you and exploring a potential partnership, specifically in relation to her nonprofit organization, KGS Foundation for All, which focuses on expanding access to STEAM and robotics education for students.

Best regards,

Kay

Is there anyone at EZ-Robot I should talk to about influencer partnerships?

my Whiteout Survival collab hit 48M views and generated over 100k users - I had one with Gauth AI (over 15M views) - that's fire!

Imann from ItssIMANNN

messages.subject: partnership?

messages.email_body:
Dennis— revisited your site and thought of some angles for the videos.

A few ideas:

- Friends doubt my robot-building skills, I show them my EZ-Robot creation, it starts dancing, they freak out and ask for a tutorial.
- School project day, I bring my EZ-Robot, classmates struggle with poster boards, mine solves a maze, everyone gathers around.
- Teacher says "no tech in class," I sneak in my EZ-Robot, it delivers snacks to my friends, teachers can't help but laugh.

Content in this style got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across the platforms.worth exploring or nah?

Best, Imann

If not a fit let me know

Imann - ItssIMANNN

Across all platforms, we hit up to 361M views monthly, with a trusted community of 10M+ subscribers.

Let’s chat about how we can create something engaging for Dreamworks Direct.

I can do Wed 2pm or 4pm and Fri 1pm or 3pm EST — does that work?

messages.email_body: Cool, Courtney! I've set up a meeting on 2nd of June to revisit, we can push it further if needed. Excited for this! We have great plans for Brainscape.

Hey Arun

Is there anyone at Ada, the National College for Digital Skills I should talk to about influencer partnerships?

I run ItssIMANNN with nearly 10M subscribers and we get up to 361M monthly views.

my Whiteout Survival collab hit 48M views and generated over 100k of new users - I had one with Gauth AI too (over 15M views) - that's fire.

There’s a lot of digital skills education fans watching our videos —seems like that's exactly who Ada College is built for.

Worth a quick chat?

Imann from ItssIMANNN

If you don't want to hear from me let me know
messages.subject: quick question Arun

messages.email_body:
Arun, went back to your site and brainstormed ideas for the videos,

Could go a few ways:

- Friends panic about coding class project, I show them how Ada's curriculum makes it easy, we finish in half the time.
- I'm struggling with a game design project, my Ada friend gives me tips from her class, I level up my game instantly.
- Chatting with friends about future careers, I mention Ada, they all pull out their phones to look it up, "I want in!" 

These formats got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across our channels—Worth exploring ?

-Imann

If doesnt seem like a fit let me know
messages.subject: RE: quick question Arun

messages.email_body:
Hey Arun, 

I've been waiting for your message for so long that my hair has turned gray, I've grown a beard, lost my sight, and even my hearing—but I haven't lost my sense of humor. 


Still good to connect on this end. How about an intro call next week or after?

Best,
Imman

If this is not relevant - let me know
messages.subject: RE: quick question Arun

messages.email_body:
Hi Immanuel,

I must admit, your last email gave me a giggle!!

 Please accept my apologies for the delayed response; I have just returned for my first week back after being away for the winter break since December 16th.

I would be happy to hop on a call to discuss your ideas, though I want to manage expectations as I am not entirely sure yet how I might best support this initiative from my side. If you are still interested in connecting, please let me know if you have any availability next week for a brief conversation.

Best regards,

Arun

Worth a quick chat?

Imann from ItssIMANNN

If you don't want to hear from me let me know

Best,
Imman

messages.email_body:
Hi Daniel

Do you know who at Fifth Door who manages influencer partnerships?

I run ItssIMANNN with almost 10M subscribers pulling up to 361M monthly views -

a video collab with Whiteout Survival hit 48M views and brought in over 100k users, andplus my collab with Gauth AI (over 15M views)—that's fire!

There’s a lot of casual gaming fans watching our videos —seems like that's exactly who Fifth Door is built for.

Worth a quick chat?

Imann - ItssIMANNN

If not a fit let me know

Best,
Imman
messages.subject: partnership?

messages.email_body:
hey Imman,

thx for reaching out. to be upfront, we probably aren't ready for a partnership of this nature yet, still working on the core product, but id love to chat with you about how you typically structure something like this for the future if you are open. 

not sure if you have read much about our company, or if this is a blanket outreach, but for some context, i was one of the founders of a self-driving car company (Cruise) that sold to GM in 2016. Now im working on bringing joy back into the world with games. would love to connect if you are open. want to find time here? https://calendar.app.google/m4HLpw18iSLA62869

best,
dan

messages.subject: Andrew - Imann

messages.email_body:
Andrew - revisited your site and thought of some angles for the videos.

A few ideas:

- I’m stuck on subway bored, start Skillz tournament with fellow rider, we all win gift cards, strangers high-five.
- Co-workers trash-talk, I suggest Skillz tourney for free lunch, shy intern wins, boss buys sandwiches for everyone.
- My little sister mocks my gaming, I show Skillz cash prize, she beats me, deposits winnings into her bank.

Content in this style got me over 48m views and 100k users for White Out survival across all platforms.worth exploring or not?

Best, Imann

If you don't want to hear from me let me know


Best,
Imman

Hi Eliot

Oh cool, my business partner Jan is based there. We have a unique way of reaching specific audiences. 79% of people watching our videos are non-subscribers—these are viewers chosen by the platform's algorithm based on their interests in the topics we cover. 

That being said, videos that we would record targeting people of New York would be targeted by the algorithm to get as many people from NYC as possible but we can’t guarantee that this will be the only city that would be targeted since after the videos go viral (sometimes to 50m) views - its natural for the algorithm to expand on the audience further than one city.
